subject: english
source_title: Third Term SS1 English Language Lesson Notes
learning_objectives: Use comparatives to compare two things

sections.heading: Meaning
sections.content: Comparative is the second degree of comparison of adjectives and usually shows a higher or lower degree of a quality.

sections.heading: Forms
sections.content: The note shows regular forms with -er, forms with more, decreased degree with less, and irregular forms such as good/better, bad/worse, little/less, and far/farther.
